title: 20 people observed a multicolor UFO for 1 hour in  Curitiba-PR [1994]
excerpt: JAN 15th, 1994. Time: 20:05. Duration: 1 hour. In Curitiba, Paraná State, about 20 people spotted an unidentified flying object moving south. text_preview:
JAN 15th, 1994. Time: 20:05. Duration: 1 hour. In Curitiba, Paraná State, about 20 people spotted an unidentified flying object moving south. According to the witness that reported the sighting, the UFO was red and sometimes changed to yellow. The same witness was unable to estimate the size and shape of the object that emitted the lights. It was informed that there was filming of the sighting, but the video file was not made available.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANB
summary: On Jan 15, 1994, about 20 people in Curitiba-PR observed a red-to-yellow multicolor UFO moving south for 1 hour; filming was reported but not made available.
